BETA INCORPORATED

FORM 8-K CURRENT REPORT

Item 5.02 Departure of Directors or Certain Officers; Election of Directors; Appointment of Certain Officers

Effective March 15, 2026, the Board of Directors appointed Sarah Johnson as Chief Financial Officer.

Ms. Johnson will receive an annual base salary of $900,000.

Item 9.01 Financial Statements and Exhibits

Exhibit 99.1 — Press release announcing CFO appointment
